title: lippia wrightii
intro: Lippia wrightii, also known as Wright's lippia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Lippia wrightii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
